offer: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/month, inaccurate delivery compliance reporting causes supplier penalties. We convert raw logistics tracking data into delivery compliance reports instead of manual tracking and reporting.
problem: Inaccurate delivery compliance reporting leads to penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Indie Hackers discussions on logistics workflows
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Community forums where logistics carriers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for tracking and reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
